summary: V3 testing complete. All 26 features tested and working correctly. Backend: Admin login (correct/wrong password), admin leads endpoint (auth required, returns sorted leads without _id), trip inquiries still work. Frontend: Admin dashboard (login screen, stats cards, leads table, search, CSV download, logout), Language switcher (EN/DE/FR with localStorage persistence), Instagram section (8 tiles with correct links), all translations working (Navbar, Hero, Trip Builder, FAQ, Footer, Floating WhatsApp).
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during backend testing (prefixed with test emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 features fully tested: (1) Admin dashboard at /admin with password gate, 4 stat cards, leads table, search, CSV export, logout - all working. (2) Language switcher EN/DE/FR in Navbar with localStorage persistence 'sl_lang' - all translations verified for Nav links, Hero, Trip Builder labels, FAQ heading, Footer headings, Floating WhatsApp tooltip, Instagram section. (3) Instagram section with 8-tile grid above Footer linking to instagram.com/serendiblocal (target=_blank) - MOCKED with static tiles from EXPERIENCES data. V2 features verified still working: Packages grid, currency toggle, FAQ accordion, Trip Builder form, Package detail page with itinerary accordion.
